vocab.meaning: khả năng ghi nhớ thông tin
vocab.example: Studies suggest that reading on paper enhances cognitive retention compared to scrolling through digital text.
I find it nearly impossible to concentrate when reading from a glaring screen under direct sunlight.

vocab.meaning: tương tác với văn bản (ghi chú, gạch chân...)
vocab.example: Hardcopies allow me to interact with the text more deeply by scribbling notes in the margins.

vocab.meaning: công nghệ mực điện tử (giúp mắt ít mỏi)
vocab.example: Modern e-readers utilize e-ink technology to mimic the appearance of ordinary ink on paper.

vocab.meaning: giải pháp tiết kiệm không gian
vocab.example: For those living in small apartments, digital libraries are an ideal space-saving solution.

vocab.meaning: lật nhanh/đọc lướt qua các trang
vocab.example: I love to flick through the pages of a magazine to find interesting articles before settling down to read.
Hardcover encyclopedias can be quite clunky and cumbersome, making tablets a much more agile choice.

vocab.meaning: khả năng tiếp cận tức thì
vocab.example: The biggest draw of digital reading is the instant accessibility to thousands of titles at the click of a button.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: There is an undeniable aesthetic appeal to a physical bookshelf filled with well-worn novels.
Physical books provide a strain-free reading experience that high-resolution tablets still can't quite replicate.
